name: Push Ups
description: Keep your back straight, lower until chest nearly touches floor.

name: Tricep Dips
description: Hands behind on chair, lower body, then push up.

name: Bicep Curls
description: Curl dumbbells slowly, elbows at sides.

name: Arm Circles
description: Rotate arms in circles to warm up shoulders.

name: Diamond Push Ups
description: Hands form a diamond, lower chest to hands.

name: Crunches
description: Lie on back, lift shoulders toward knees.

name: Plank
description: Hold your body straight like a board.

name: Leg Raises
description: Lie on back, lift legs straight up and down.

name: Bicycle Crunches
description: Alternate elbow to opposite knee while lying down.

name: Side Plank
description: Hold your body on one side, elbow under shoulder.

name: Squats
description: Feet shoulder width, lower hips to parallel.

name: Lunges
description: Step forward, bend both knees, push back.

name: Glute Bridges
description: Lie on back, lift hips upward.

name: Wall Sit
description: Back against wall, knees at 90 degrees.

name: Calf Raises
description: Stand on toes, lift and lower slowly.

name: Chest Push Ups
description: Hands slightly wider than shoulders, lower chest.

name: Wide Push Ups
description: Hands wider than shoulder-width, lower chest.

name: Incline Push Ups
description: Hands on elevated surface, lower chest slowly.

name: Chest Fly
description: Lie on back, open arms wide, then bring together.

name: Clap Push Ups
description: Push off floor explosively and clap hands.

name: Superman
description: Lie face down, lift arms and legs simultaneously.

name: Reverse Fly
description: Bend forward, lift arms sideways.

name: Bird Dog
description: Extend opposite arm and leg, hold, switch.

name: Cobra Stretch
description: Lie on stomach, lift chest using arms.

name: Pull Ups
description: Pull body up until chin passes bar.

name: Burpees
description: Squat, jump back to plank, push up, jump up.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: In plank, drive knees alternately to chest.

name: Jumping Jacks
description: Jump feet out while raising arms overhead.

name: High Knees
description: Run in place, lifting knees high.

name: Skater Jumps
description: Jump side to side landing on one leg.
